description: Zweig Breadth Thrust + Whaley January Barometer + Coppock Curve. 11-of-11 historical 12m positive returns when fired. State machine NULL/ARMED/FIRED/COOLDOWN. Polygon grouped aggs for NYSE A/D ratio, cached incrementally. Forward returns computed live from 20y SPY history at curated trigger dates. Daily 22:00 UTC.
